hero-description: Activewear created for women who want to move freely, train confidently, and stay true to who they are
newsletter-description: Join to get special offers, free giveaways, and updates about our new collections.

story_title: You’ve Been Compromising — And You Shouldn’t Have To.
story_line1: You love to move. To train. To feel strong in your body.
story_line2: But too often, sportswear asks you to give something up — your comfort, your coverage, or your confidence.
story_line3: ESC was created for women who are done compromising.
footer-description: ESC Wear - Edgy, Sporty, and Comfy brand designed for the modern modest woman, where performance meets style.
no-sizes-available: No sizes are available for this color.
about-headline: ESC Was Created for Women Like You.
about-line1: ESC Wear started with a simple but powerful realization: modest women deserve better sportswear.
about-line3: But intentionally designed from the ground up.
about-line4: Movement is more than exercise — it is self-respect, growth, and strength.
about-line5: When a woman feels confident in what she wears, she shows up differently in every area of life.
about-promises: ESC is built on three promises:
promise1-text: Pieces that support stretching, training, running, and everyday life.
promise2-text: Coverage is part of the design, not an afterthought.
promise3-text: When your clothes work with you, confidence follows naturally.
about-final: ESC isn't about trends. It's about building a standard women can finally trust.
vision-text: To become the leading modest sportswear brand in the MENA region and a global reference for conscious performance activewear.
mission-text: To empower women through high-performance modest sportswear that moves with them physically, mentally, and spiritually.
community-text: Connect with thousands of women who share the same passion for modest fitness and confident movement.
collections-headline: Made to Move. Made to Cover. Made for You.
collections-copy: Every ESC piece is designed with intention — so you can move through your day feeling comfortable and confident.
name: Name
subject: Subject
contact-message-sent: Thank you for your message! We will get back to you soon.
contact-message-failed: Failed to send message. Please try again.
returns-policy-subtitle: At ESC Wear, every piece is designed to perform. If your order doesn't meet our standards, we'll handle it — quickly and transparently.
returns-intro: At ESC Wear, every piece is designed to perform. If your order doesn't meet our standards, we'll handle it — quickly and transparently.
exchanges-point-1: Exchanges are available within 14 days from the delivery date.
exchanges-point-2: Items must be unworn, unwashed, and in original condition, with all tags attached.
exchanges-point-3: Exchanges are subject to product availability at the time of processing.
exchanges-point-4: Exchange shipping fees are the responsibility of the customer, unless the item received was defective or incorrect.
refunds-subtitle: Refunds are issued only in the following cases:
refunds-point-3: Refund requests must be submitted within 48 hours of delivery.
refunds-point-4: Once the item is returned, inspected, and approved, refunds will be processed within 7–14 business days to the original payment method.
non-returnable-subtitle: To maintain hygiene and quality standards, we cannot accept returns or exchanges for:
non-returnable-point-1: Items that have been worn or washed
non-returnable-point-3: Discounted or clearance items (unless defective upon arrival)
assistance-intro: To initiate a return or exchange, please contact us with:
order-number-info: This helps us identify your purchase quickly.
photos-info: If applicable, provide photos of the item and any issues.
explanation-info: Let us know what the issue is so we can help you better.
